must_detect.matched_text: For capital‑markets, drafts of earnings, prospectus markups, and pre‑filing investor presentations for Bayan Stock Exchange are restricted MNPI; access is limited to the deal team and our Isla Securities Commission filings unit.

Incident response: any suspected breach involving health, biometric, or genetic data will trigger a 72‑hour report to the Philippine data protection authority and, where applicable, a parallel notice to the securities regulator if MNPI is implicated.

—information from which an individual’s identity is apparent or can be reasonably and directly ascertained with other data—and we segregate MNPI under the Securities Regulation Code (SRC), where material non-public information could influence a reasonable investor.
Data categories: HR files (payroll and benefits records), banking details for salary credit, tax and audit workpapers, capital‑markets materials (draft disclosures, order blotters, registrar lists), and user support logs for LakbayPay and BayaniBond apps.
Example anchored processing: Mr. Rodel Vega (employee no. LH‑00871) provided fingerprint templates for timekeeping and disclosed a hypertension treatment plan and Roman Catholic faith for HMO dependents enrollment.
Another anchored case: Ms. Celina Ordoña, a union officer in the LHI Workers Circle, opted‑in to receive updates on collective bargaining, and declared same‑sex domestic partnership for spousal medical coverage.
For capital‑markets, drafts of earnings, prospectus markups, and pre‑filing investor presentations for Bayan Stock Exchange are restricted MNPI; access is limited to the deal team and our Isla Securities Commission filings unit.
We do not sell personal data; cross‑border transfers to processors in Laguna del Sur Tech Park and to Cloud Archipelago Pte. in Singapura City occur under inter‑affiliate data sharing agreements and standard contractual safeguards.
Retention: payroll and tax records for 10 years; biometric logs for 12 months; MNPI artifacts until public disclosure plus 3 years; deletion is certified by the Records Custodian, Dr. Alodia Tan‑Santos.
Data subject rights: access, correction, deletion, and objection may be exercised by emailing dpo@lakanholdings.example or writing the Data Protection Office, 19th Flr., Lakandula Tower, Barangay Sampaguita, San Geronimo City 1209.
Identity verification for DSARs requires a match against HR file, security badge number, and a recent selfie; no government IDs are collected for this step.
Incident response: any suspected breach involving health, biometric, or genetic data will trigger a 72‑hour report to the Philippine data protection authority and, where applicable, a parallel notice to the securities regulator if MNPI is implicated.
Our Inclusive Horizons Policy and DEI training discuss religion and sexual orientation in a general sense to foster respect, and a religion‑friendly cafeteria menu is just a metaphor for inclusive culture.
Note: the Sampaguita Tigers winning the cup is irrelevant to this notice, just as our Mango Breeze Card is not our bread and butter.
For investor queries on MNPI handling in relation to BayaniBond offerings, contact capital‑markets@lakanholdings.example; for HR and payroll banking matters, contact hr
